parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Player
participant "vc: VirologistController" as vc
participant "v:Virologist" as v
participant "rrs:RoundRunStrategy" as rrs
participant "vw:VirologistView" as vw

Player -> vc : **1** collectEventListener(e: Event)
activate vc
vc -> v : **2** getRoundRunStrategy()
activate v
v -->> vc : **3** rrs
deactivate v
vc -> rrs : **4** collect(field: Field)
activate rrs
rrs -->> vc : **5**
deactivate rrs
vc -> vw : **6** renderActionMenu()
activate vw
vw -->> vc : **7**
deactivate vw
vc -->> Player : **8**
deactivate vc
@enduml
```
